TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tabakiay_diheb, title = tabakiay_diheb, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tabakiay_diheb} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == tabakiay diheb "Ing a kamu Grand Canyon, how-pi a kamu Ongtupqa, Ya-wa-pay a kamu Wi:ka'i:la" tini i Amey-li-ka Ya-li-san-na sapipan nusamisa, nu Ke-low-la-tu-he micaliway tupanaay tu a lasubu emang a mihcaan tu kacedas, sakulikulit satuway, katalawan masatepad. 1979 a mihcaan tabakiay diheb mala u niliwanan a zaysang i kitakit. i ayadah nu cayay ku sikangkeyay a baziyung kitakit nu waluay tuhakay aazihan masulit tu ku ngangan nu tabakiay diheb. imahini u A-mey-lika ku mikwanay tu kanatal aidangan. 1540 a mihcaan izaw ku cacay ci Cya-si-ya¬∑Low-peyc¬∑te¬∑ka-te-na-s "Garc√≠a L√≥pez de C√°rdenas" a Si-pang-ya a tademaw saayaway pakazih tu tabakiay diheb. 19 se-ci 70 a ziday, Amey-li-ka tukusay a hitay saw-wi ci Ye-han¬∑wi-s-li¬∑paw-wi-al mikelid tu saayaway a nu ke-sye nu miasihay a kaput tayza i tabakiay a diheb. paw-wi-al patinaku tu dihebay nu maleneknekay nu sadangay a ba'tu mahiza "u belih nu cudadan a kungku". saca, nuayawan izaw tu ku Mey-cow a In-ti-an a tademaw i tepad nu diheb mana'nel tu. 1540ŚĻī,šłÄŚÄčŚźćŚŹęŚä†Ť•Ņšļě¬∑ÁĺÖŚüĻŤĆ≤¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑Ść°Śĺ∑ÁīćśĖĮ(Garc√≠a L√≥pez de C√°rdenas) . hekal a lala' ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ tabakiay diheb sailabuay 1900 a depah. Makay Li-se a sacumud "Lee's Ferry" katukuh Han-s-syen-tan "Hance Rapid" yadiheb haymaw sa matikenih, tahkal tu ku sadang nu ba'tu. makay sasa nu diheb katukuh i tukun miduduc tu tepad tahkal tu nu ayaway han-u-ci katukuh tu maluhay a ziday kasasilac nu ba'tu, mahapinang ku kasadang sadang nu ba'tu masazumazuma ku kulit, sinamihcaan tu ku lala' situngusay tu maliwanay i ba'tu nu mauzipay. diheb cayay tu kacacayat tu Ke-lan-te-wa-sen-ay "Grand Wash Fault". . tabakiay diheb u lilis u kilakilangan, milakui' tayza i diheban akuti' tuway, katukuh isasa ku likelikenan, sakasa tabakiay diheban pasu tu makay kilakilang a hekal nu mauzipay. kanatal aidangan nipalumaan tu mulangawan katukuh tu1500 a lamangan, iza ku 355 a lamangan ku cilucilut, 89 a lamangan tu micucuay a aadupen, 47 a lamangan ku minabuyay a cilekay atu aadipen, 9 a lamangan tu sikuku'sy a aadupen, 17 a lamangan ku mauzipay a buting. . saka 26 ku nikala cong-tung nu A-ey-li-ka ci Ti-aw-tu¬∑Lo-s-bu u kanamuhan aca nu katuuday tabakiay diheb, kinapina tu ciniza itini miadup tu layun nu Mey-cow anucaay mikinaul tup ala. Á¨¨26 mitahaway nu si-pang-yaŤ•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôśéĘťö™Śģ∂ su-yan 1540 a mihca 9 a bulad, si-pang-ya nu midemecay ci Ba-lan-si-s-ke¬∑Low-pey-c¬∑te¬∑ke-low-na-tu patulun mikilim tu nakamuan tu Si-pow-la pitu a tukay. mahizasa, kinciw ci Cya-si-ya¬∑Low-pey-c¬∑te¬∑Ka-ti-na-s mikelid tu adidi'ay a kaput Si-pang-ya a hitay atu pinaay a tademaw nu How-piy-cu u mamikelid, katukuh tu tiniay piazihan tu likelikenan "Desert View" tu mu-lye-bung "Moran Point" a laed nu tabakiay a diheb tumul a tukus. Hitay ci Pa-pu-low¬∑te¬∑Mey-ke-low-sa "Pablo de Melgrossa", Bu-an¬∑Cya-le-la-s "Juan Galeras" atu zuma a hitay pasayza I sasa nu diheb mutulil pakala tut ulu hun tu cacay a zazan, nka manikaw tu nanum apanukas aca. itawyaay a Hi-pi a binacadan mikelid huntu matineng tu macapiay a katayzan i sasaay nu diheb, sisa u zuma hakay makai mikelid tu S-pang-ya tayza. Zikuz tu tusa lasubu tu a mihcaan, inayi' tu ku zumaay Ow-cow a tademaw mizizaway tu tabakiay diheb. katukuh 1776 a mihcaan, kya izaw ku tusaay bukesi nu Si-pang-ya miliyaw aca tayni tu tabakiay a diheb ci Ba-lan-s-ke¬∑A-tana-siw¬∑tu-min-ke "Francisco Atanasio Dominguez" a sinpu atu ci Si-al-wi-s-te¬∑Wit-le-c¬∑te¬∑ay-s-ka-lan-te "Silvestre Velez de Escalante" a sinpu. itawya ku heni mikelid tu adidi'ay sakaput a hitay i satimul nu Yu-ta-cow mkilim tu malitin macapiay a Sen-ta-bey atu Cya-li-bu-ni-ya, teban nu zazan makay Ke-lun a diheb katukuh ta-li dihebay a tabakiay diheb tu saamisan a tukus. ÁõīŤá≥1776ŚĻī, (Francisco Atanasio Dominguez)Á•ěÁą∂ŤąáŤ•ŅÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁČĻ¬∑Á∂≠ŚčíŤĆ≤¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑ŚüÉśĖĮŚć°Ťė≠ÁČĻ(Silvestre Velez de Escalante)Á•ěÁą∂. . mitahaway nu A-mey-lika ÁĺéŚúčśéĘťö™Śģ∂ mitahaway nu A-mey-likaÁĺéŚúčśéĘťö™Śģ∂ 1826 a mihcaan, Tan-mu-s¬∑e-hay-e¬∑pa-ti "James Ohio Pattie" miladay tu cacay a kaput nu miadupay nu A-mey-lika tayza ku tiziay a atademaw, nika izaw ku nisulitan tuyni a kawaw. ci pa-ti hakay u makay S-pan-ya a bukesi zikuz muliyaw mizizaw tu tabakiay diheban u saayaway nu Ow-cow a tademaw. 19 se-ci-con-yeg, cacay ku mu-me-cyew bukesi ci Ya-ke¬∑han-pu-lin "Jacob Hamblin" mapaculcul nu zumaay a kiwkay tayza i tabakiay a diheb mikilim tu tatungusay kitizaan mibalat milakui' tu Ke-low-lw-tu-he. Ciniza atu tizaay a binacadan atu salengacay a tademaw mana'nel kapah ku nikalabelaw, uyza i 1858 a mihcaan maazih ku Li-s a sacumud atu Pi-al-s a sacumud "Pierce Ferry" zikuz ci Ha-li-sen¬∑Pi-al-s "Harrison Pierce" ku mikawaway a pangangan" uyni tukus ku tabakiay diheb tusa dada' ku sacumud. 19 ¬∑śľĘŚłÉśěó(Jacob Hamblin) (Pierce Ferry,ŚĺĆÁĒĪŚďąťáĆś£ģ¬∑ÁöģÁąĺśĖĮ(Harrison Pierce) (Joseph Ives) . zikuz "mitesekay nu mitahaway" misetu tu ungcung, sisa ales han tu. ci Ay-li-s mikelid aca tu misakaputay pazawali mumul, mala u saayaway nu micumuday tu budawan a sauwac "Diamond Creek" I likid nu nanu amiduduc tu tabakiay diheb timul a tukus pasawaliay muculil Ow-cow a tademaw. šĻčŚĺĆ" . likisi nu ayzaay aziday ŤŅĎšĽ£ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 1956 a mihcaan, tabakiay diheb iyawya A-mey-lik nu misiwbayay a hikuki i kitakit u pihacangay nu mahetikay a hikuki. 6 a bulad 30 a demiad tu sananal, cacay A-mey-lika hwan-ciw hikuki a kusi "TWA" "Low-ke-si-te u kapahay a pienengan" "Lockheed Super Constellation" labangay a hikuki atu cacay A-mey-lika kapulung hikuki a kusi "taw-ke-la-s DC-7 "Douglas DC-7" a hikuki 3 satulil ku laed ayaw makay Low-sen-ci a pahikukian "Los Angeles International Airport" mubalel pasawali mubahel. 1956ŚĻī, "(Lockheed Super Constellation) DC-7" (Los Angeles International Airport)ŤĶ∑ť£õŚźĎśĚĪťÉ®ť£õŤ°Ć. pakala tu 90 a saculilan, u nipaazih i pabaw tu tusaay a hikuki masasetul i tapuku nu tabakiay a diheb, kinapeci' mahetik i nuwalian nu diheb,micapi tu Ke-low-la-tu a sauwac atu kasacubelis nu adidi'ay a Ke-low-la-tu a sauwac. 128 ku mapatayay nu tademaw, tusa a hikukian nu pacililay atu mikawaway mahamin mapatay. caay ku timulan atukus nu diheb "palalecad tu talakaw macaliway ku 2134 depah"pihibangan piadihan midang dada', manamuh tu nu katulay a kakelic mipalid muculil. muculilay miliwku, mikacaway tu low atu miduduc tu sauwac mapalil katukuh isasa nu duheb, uyzasa, pizateng lalaedan muculil, uyza u isasaay a diheb nu akuti' katalawan amawalak, situngusay mikuwan caay pisulul pananukay tu cacay a demiad. kanakatu duduc tu tukas miluwku pihaymawitu muculil, caay kaibatad izaw ku nipatizeng tu aazihan a payay.

k…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa-tu-ńß…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tupanaaj tu a r~…ĺasubu …ômaŇč a mińß ¶aan tu ka ¶…ôdas, sakur~…ĺikur~…ĺit satuwaj, katar~…ĺawan masat…ôpad. **** a mińß ¶aan tabakiaj dińß…ôb mar~…ĺa u nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč i kitakit. i ajadańß nu ¶ajaj ku sikaŇčk…ôaj a bazijuŇč kitakit nu war~…ĺuaj tuńßakaj aazińßan masur~…ĺit tu ku ŇčaŇčan nu tabakiaj dińß…ôb. imańßini u a-m…ô-r~…ĺika ku mikwanaj tu kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan izaw ku ¶a ¶aj ¶i ¶ja-si-ja*r~…ĺow-p…ô ¶*t…ô*ka-t…ô-na-s "gar ¶*a r~…ĺ*p…ôz d…ô ¶*rd…ônas" a si-paŇč-ja a tad…ômaw saajawaj pakazińß tu tabakiaj dińß…ôb. ** patinaku tu dińß…ôbaj nu mar~…ĺ…ôn…ôkn…ôkaj nu sadaŇčaj a ba Ē~ °tu mańßiza "u b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ¶udadan a kuŇčku". sa ¶a, nuajawan izaw tu ku m…ô- ¶ow a in-ti-an a tad…ômaw i t…ôpad nu dińß…ôb mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ tu. *****,******************(gar ¶*a r~…ĺ*p…ôz d…ô ¶*rd…ônas) . ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° **** tabakiaj dińß…ôb sair~…ĺabuaj **** a d…ôpańß. makaj r~…ĺi-s…ô a sa ¶umud "r~…ĺ…ô…ô Ē~ °s r~…ĺa…ôd nu tabakiaj a dińß…ôb tumur~…ĺ a tukus. ńßitaj ¶i pa-pu-r~…ĺow*t…ô*m…ô-k…ô-r~…ĺow-sa "pabr~…ĺo d…ô m…ôr~…ĺgrossa", bu-an* ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-r~…ĺa-s "*uan gar~…ĺ…ôras" atu zuma a ńßitaj pasajza i sasa nu dińß…ôb mutur~…ĺir~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tut ur~…ĺu ńßun tu ¶a ¶aj a zazan, nka manikaw tu nanum apanukas a ¶a. itawjaaj a ńßi-pi a bina ¶adan mik…ôr~…ĺid ńßuntu matin…ôŇč tu ma ¶apiaj a katajzan i sasaaj nu dińß…ôb, sisa u zuma ńßakaj makai mik…ôr~…ĺid tu s-paŇč-ja tajza. zikuz tu tusa r~…ĺasubu tu a mińß ¶aan, inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zumaaj ow- ¶ow a tad…ômaw mizizawaj tu tabakiaj dińß…ôb. katukuńß sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ kapańß ku nikar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw, ujza i **** a mińß ¶aan maazińß ku r~…ĺi-s a sa ¶umud atu pi-ar~…ĺ-s a sa ¶umud "pi…ôr ¶…ô f…ôrrj" zikuz ¶i pi…ôr ¶…ô) (*os…ôpńß i*…ôs) . zikuz "mit…ôs…ôkaj nu mitańßawaj" mis…ôtu tu uŇč ¶uŇč, sisa ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan tu. ¶i aj-r~…ĺi-s mik…ôr~…ĺid a ¶a tu misakaputaj pazawar~…ĺi mumur~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa u saajawaj nu mi ¶umudaj tu budawan a sauwa ¶ "diamond ¶r…ô…ôk" i r~…ĺikid nu nanu amidudu ¶ tu tabakiaj dińß…ôb timur~…ĺ a tukus pasawar~…ĺiaj mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ow- ¶ow a tad…ômaw. **" . r~…ĺikisi nu ajzaaj azidaj **** **** a mińß ¶aan, tabakiaj dińß…ôb ijawja a-m…ô-r~…ĺik nu misiwbajaj a ńßikuki i kitakit u pińßa ¶aŇčaj nu mańß…ôtikaj a ńßikuki. * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ, ¶a ¶aj a-m…ô-r~…ĺika ńßwan- ¶iw ńßikuki a kusi "twa" "r~…ĺow-k…ô-si-t…ô u kapańßaj a pi…ôn…ôŇčan" "r~…ĺo ¶kńß…ô…ôd sup…ôr ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation" r~…ĺabaŇčaj a ńßikuki atu ¶a ¶aj a-m…ô-r~…ĺika kapur~…ĺuŇč ńßikuki a kusi "taw-k…ô-r~…ĺa-s d ¶-* "dougr~…ĺas d ¶-*" a ńßikuki * satur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku r~…ĺa…ôd ajaw makaj r~…ĺow-s…ôn- ¶i a pańßikukian "r~…ĺos aŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôs int…ôrnationar~…ĺ airport" mubar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ pasawar~…ĺi mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. *****, "(r~…ĺo ¶kńß…ô…ôd sup…ôr ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation) d ¶-*" (r~…ĺos aŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôs int…ôrnationar~…ĺ airport)*******. pakar~…ĺa tu ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, u nipaazińß i pabaw tu tusaaj a ńßikuki masas…ôtur~…ĺ i tapuku nu tabakiaj a dińß…ôb, kinap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° mańß…ôtik i nuwar~…ĺian nu dińß…ôb,mi ¶api tu k…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa-tu a sauwa ¶ atu kasa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis nu adidi Ē~ °aj a k…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa-tu a sauwa ¶. *** ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, tusa a ńßikukian nu pa ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺaj atu mikawawaj mańßamin mapataj. ¶aaj ku timur~…ĺan atukus nu dińß…ôb "par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…ĺakaw ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku **** d…ôpańß"pińßibaŇčan piadińßan midaŇč dada Ē~ °, manamuńß tu nu katur~…ĺaj a kak…ôr~…ĺi ¶ mipar~…ĺid mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj mir~…ĺiwku, mika ¶awaj tu r~…ĺow atu midudu ¶ tu sauwa ¶ mapar~…ĺir~…ĺ katukuńß isasa nu duńß…ôb, ujzasa, pizat…ôŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺa…ôdan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ujza u isasaaj a dińß…ôb nu akuti Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan amawar~…ĺak, situŇčusaj mikuwan ¶aaj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ pananukaj tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad. kanakatu dudu ¶ tu tukas mir~…ĺuwku pińßajmawitu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj kaibatad izaw ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu aazińßan a pajaj.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == tabakiay diheb "Ing a kamu Grand Canyon, how-pi a kamu Ongtupqa, Ya-wa-pay a kamu Wi:ka'i:la" tini i Amey-li-ka Ya-li-san-na sapipan nusamisa, nu Ke-low-la-tu-he micaliway tupanaay tu a lasubu emang a mihcaan tu kacedas, sakulikulit satuway, katalawan masatepad. 1979 a mihcaan tabakiay diheb mala u niliwanan a zaysang i kitakit. i ayadah nu cayay ku sikangkeyay a baziyung kitakit nu waluay tuhakay aazihan masulit tu ku ngangan nu tabakiay diheb. imahini u A-mey-lika ku mikwanay tu kanatal aidangan. 1540 a mihcaan izaw ku cacay ci Cya-si-ya¬∑Low-peyc¬∑te¬∑ka-te-na-s "Garc√≠a L√≥pez de C√°rdenas" a Si-pang-ya a tademaw saayaway pakazih tu tabakiay diheb. 19 se-ci 70 a ziday, Amey-li-ka tukusay a hitay saw-wi ci Ye-han¬∑wi-s-li¬∑paw-wi-al mikelid tu saayaway a nu ke-sye nu miasihay a kaput tayza i tabakiay a diheb. paw-wi-al patinaku tu dihebay nu maleneknekay nu sadangay a ba'tu mahiza "u belih nu cudadan a kungku". saca, nuayawan izaw tu ku Mey-cow a In-ti-an a tademaw i tepad nu diheb mana'nel tu. 1540ŚĻī,šłÄŚÄčŚźćŚŹęŚä†Ť•Ņšļě¬∑ÁĺÖŚüĻŤĆ≤¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑Ść°Śĺ∑ÁīćśĖĮ(Garc√≠a L√≥pez de C√°rdenas) . hekal a lala' ŚúįÁźÜÁíįŚĘÉ tabakiay diheb sailabuay 1900 a depah. Makay Li-se a sacumud "Lee's Ferry" katukuh Han-s-syen-tan "Hance Rapid" yadiheb haymaw sa matikenih, tahkal tu ku sadang nu ba'tu. makay sasa nu diheb katukuh i tukun miduduc tu tepad tahkal tu nu ayaway han-u-ci katukuh tu maluhay a ziday kasasilac nu ba'tu, mahapinang ku kasadang sadang nu ba'tu masazumazuma ku kulit, sinamihcaan tu ku lala' situngusay tu maliwanay i ba'tu nu mauzipay. diheb cayay tu kacacayat tu Ke-lan-te-wa-sen-ay "Grand Wash Fault". . tabakiay diheb u lilis u kilakilangan, milakui' tayza i diheban akuti' tuway, katukuh isasa ku likelikenan, sakasa tabakiay diheban pasu tu makay kilakilang a hekal nu mauzipay. kanatal aidangan nipalumaan tu mulangawan katukuh tu1500 a lamangan, iza ku 355 a lamangan ku cilucilut, 89 a lamangan tu micucuay a aadupen, 47 a lamangan ku minabuyay a cilekay atu aadipen, 9 a lamangan tu sikuku'sy a aadupen, 17 a lamangan ku mauzipay a buting. . saka 26 ku nikala cong-tung nu A-ey-li-ka ci Ti-aw-tu¬∑Lo-s-bu u kanamuhan aca nu katuuday tabakiay diheb, kinapina tu ciniza itini miadup tu layun nu Mey-cow anucaay mikinaul tup ala. Á¨¨26 mitahaway nu si-pang-yaŤ•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôśéĘťö™Śģ∂ su-yan 1540 a mihca 9 a bulad, si-pang-ya nu midemecay ci Ba-lan-si-s-ke¬∑Low-pey-c¬∑te¬∑ke-low-na-tu patulun mikilim tu nakamuan tu Si-pow-la pitu a tukay. mahizasa, kinciw ci Cya-si-ya¬∑Low-pey-c¬∑te¬∑Ka-ti-na-s mikelid tu adidi'ay a kaput Si-pang-ya a hitay atu pinaay a tademaw nu How-piy-cu u mamikelid, katukuh tu tiniay piazihan tu likelikenan "Desert View" tu mu-lye-bung "Moran Point" a laed nu tabakiay a diheb tumul a tukus. Hitay ci Pa-pu-low¬∑te¬∑Mey-ke-low-sa "Pablo de Melgrossa", Bu-an¬∑Cya-le-la-s "Juan Galeras" atu zuma a hitay pasayza I sasa nu diheb mutulil pakala tut ulu hun tu cacay a zazan, nka manikaw tu nanum apanukas aca. itawyaay a Hi-pi a binacadan mikelid huntu matineng tu macapiay a katayzan i sasaay nu diheb, sisa u zuma hakay makai mikelid tu S-pang-ya tayza. Zikuz tu tusa lasubu tu a mihcaan, inayi' tu ku zumaay Ow-cow a tademaw mizizaway tu tabakiay diheb. katukuh 1776 a mihcaan, kya izaw ku tusaay bukesi nu Si-pang-ya miliyaw aca tayni tu tabakiay a diheb ci Ba-lan-s-ke¬∑A-tana-siw¬∑tu-min-ke "Francisco Atanasio Dominguez" a sinpu atu ci Si-al-wi-s-te¬∑Wit-le-c¬∑te¬∑ay-s-ka-lan-te "Silvestre Velez de Escalante" a sinpu. itawya ku heni mikelid tu adidi'ay sakaput a hitay i satimul nu Yu-ta-cow mkilim tu malitin macapiay a Sen-ta-bey atu Cya-li-bu-ni-ya, teban nu zazan makay Ke-lun a diheb katukuh ta-li dihebay a tabakiay diheb tu saamisan a tukus. ÁõīŤá≥1776ŚĻī, (Francisco Atanasio Dominguez)Á•ěÁą∂ŤąáŤ•ŅÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁČĻ¬∑Á∂≠ŚčíŤĆ≤¬∑Śĺ∑¬∑ŚüÉśĖĮŚć°Ťė≠ÁČĻ(Silvestre Velez de Escalante)Á•ěÁą∂. . mitahaway nu A-mey-lika ÁĺéŚúčśéĘťö™Śģ∂ mitahaway nu A-mey-likaÁĺéŚúčśéĘťö™Śģ∂ 1826 a mihcaan, Tan-mu-s¬∑e-hay-e¬∑pa-ti "James Ohio Pattie" miladay tu cacay a kaput nu miadupay nu A-mey-lika tayza ku tiziay a atademaw, nika izaw ku nisulitan tuyni a kawaw. ci pa-ti hakay u makay S-pan-ya a bukesi zikuz muliyaw mizizaw tu tabakiay diheban u saayaway nu Ow-cow a tademaw. 19 se-ci-con-yeg, cacay ku mu-me-cyew bukesi ci Ya-ke¬∑han-pu-lin "Jacob Hamblin" mapaculcul nu zumaay a kiwkay tayza i tabakiay a diheb mikilim tu tatungusay kitizaan mibalat milakui' tu Ke-low-lw-tu-he. Ciniza atu tizaay a binacadan atu salengacay a tademaw mana'nel kapah ku nikalabelaw, uyza i 1858 a mihcaan maazih ku Li-s a sacumud atu Pi-al-s a sacumud "Pierce Ferry" zikuz ci Ha-li-sen¬∑Pi-al-s "Harrison Pierce" ku mikawaway a pangangan" uyni tukus ku tabakiay diheb tusa dada' ku sacumud. 19 ¬∑śľĘŚłÉśěó(Jacob Hamblin) (Pierce Ferry,ŚĺĆÁĒĪŚďąťáĆś£ģ¬∑ÁöģÁąĺśĖĮ(Harrison Pierce) (Joseph Ives) . zikuz "mitesekay nu mitahaway" misetu tu ungcung, sisa ales han tu. ci Ay-li-s mikelid aca tu misakaputay pazawali mumul, mala u saayaway nu micumuday tu budawan a sauwac "Diamond Creek" I likid nu nanu amiduduc tu tabakiay diheb timul a tukus pasawaliay muculil Ow-cow a tademaw. šĻčŚĺĆ" . likisi nu ayzaay aziday ŤŅĎšĽ£ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ 1956 a mihcaan, tabakiay diheb iyawya A-mey-lik nu misiwbayay a hikuki i kitakit u pihacangay nu mahetikay a hikuki. 6 a bulad 30 a demiad tu sananal, cacay A-mey-lika hwan-ciw hikuki a kusi "TWA" "Low-ke-si-te u kapahay a pienengan" "Lockheed Super Constellation" labangay a hikuki atu cacay A-mey-lika kapulung hikuki a kusi "taw-ke-la-s DC-7 "Douglas DC-7" a hikuki 3 satulil ku laed ayaw makay Low-sen-ci a pahikukian "Los Angeles International Airport" mubalel pasawali mubahel. 1956ŚĻī, "(Lockheed Super Constellation) DC-7" (Los Angeles International Airport)ŤĶ∑ť£õŚźĎśĚĪťÉ®ť£õŤ°Ć. pakala tu 90 a saculilan, u nipaazih i pabaw tu tusaay a hikuki masasetul i tapuku nu tabakiay a diheb, kinapeci' mahetik i nuwalian nu diheb,micapi tu Ke-low-la-tu a sauwac atu kasacubelis nu adidi'ay a Ke-low-la-tu a sauwac. 128 ku mapatayay nu tademaw, tusa a hikukian nu pacililay atu mikawaway mahamin mapatay. caay ku timulan atukus nu diheb "palalecad tu talakaw macaliway ku 2134 depah"pihibangan piadihan midang dada', manamuh tu nu katulay a kakelic mipalid muculil. muculilay miliwku, mikacaway tu low atu miduduc tu sauwac mapalil katukuh isasa nu duheb, uyzasa, pizateng lalaedan muculil, uyza u isasaay a diheb nu akuti' katalawan amawalak, situngusay mikuwan caay pisulul pananukay tu cacay a demiad. kanakatu duduc tu tukas miluwku pihaymawitu muculil, caay kaibatad izaw ku nipatizeng tu aazihan a payay.

k…ô-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺa-tu-ńß…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tupanaaj tu a r~…ĺasubu …ômaŇč a mińß ¶aan tu ka ¶…ôdas, sakur~…ĺikur~…ĺit satuwaj, katar~…ĺawan masat…ôpad. **** a mińß ¶aan tabakiaj dińß…ôb mar~…ĺa u nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč i kitakit. i ajadańß nu ¶ajaj ku sikaŇčk…ôaj a bazijuŇč kitakit nu war~…ĺuaj tuńßakaj aazińßan masur~…ĺit tu ku ŇčaŇčan nu tabakiaj dińß…ôb. imańßini u a-m…ô-r~…ĺika ku mikwanaj ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku **** d…ôpańß"pińßibaŇčan piadińßan midaŇč dada Ē~ °, manamuńß tu nu katur~…ĺaj a kak…ôr~…ĺi ¶ mipar~…ĺid mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj mir~…ĺiwku, mika ¶awaj tu r~…ĺow atu midudu ¶ tu sauwa ¶ mapar~…ĺir~…ĺ katukuńß isasa nu duńß…ôb, ujzasa, pizat…ôŇč r~…ĺar~…ĺa…ôdan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ujza u isasaaj a dińß…ôb nu akuti Ē~ ° katar~…ĺawan amawar~…ĺak, situŇčusaj mikuwan ¶aaj pisur~…ĺur~…ĺ pananukaj tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad. kanakatu dudu ¶ tu tukas mir~…ĺuwku pińßajmawitu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶aaj kaibatad izaw ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu aazińßan a pajaj.
